title: Tiny Dancer
why_this_song: Storytelling verses with compound noun phrases ('blue-jean baby', 'L.A. lady'). B1 challenge: parse layered descriptions.

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Tiny Dancer" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Tiny Dancer" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dancer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dancer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Long song (~6 minutes). Teach in sections — verse 1 first, then chorus. Great for visualization exercises: what does each character look like?

lines: Count the headlights on the highway
Lay me down in sheets of linen
You had a busy day today
